name: Strawberry Dream Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. For the crumb base: Combine oats, brown sugar, and butter in a bowl until crumbly.
Place half of this mixture into a shallow baking pan. Heat in a preheated moderate oven (350°F) for about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally. Set aside.
2. Press remaining crumb mixture into an ungreased 13 x 9-inch baking pan and chill.
3. For the filling: Crush 1/2 pint of strawberries. Slice the rest and set aside.
Soften gelatine in cold water. Combine softened gelatin, crushed strawberries, sugar, lemon juice, and food coloring in a saucepan. Cook over low heat, stirring occasionally until dissolved. Cool to room temperature.
4. In a large mixing bowl, beat egg whites at high speed until stiff peaks form.
Gently fold in the cooled strawberry mixture, then add whipped cream and sliced strawberries.
5. Spread evenly over the crumb base and sprinkle with reserved crumb mixture.
Chill several hours or until set. Cut into pieces and garnish with strawberry halves.
